nodes.label: P2.1 synth — early continual-forgetting sniff test
nodes.rationale: Same 3-cell layout on synth: WALL stays flat ~0.90; layer+lin and onlineBN+lin HERO cells fluctuate 0.88-0.93 across task blocks but end higher than WALL by task 5 -- consistent with the cifar preview's message that per-sample cells don't rot.
